payload.answer: I can offer repair options for how to handle this family context without saving it yet.
repair_options: Add a separate memory that Nur and Sara are your twin daughters.
If existing memories already mention Nur or Sara individually, link this context to those existing people while keeping prior facts unchanged.
Keep this as clarification only for future references to Nur and Sara, without creating a durable memory yet.
Ask you to confirm whether both Nur and Sara should be stored as your daughters and twins before committing any memory.
